subject: Need to cancel our account - too many issues
body:
Hi there,

I'm reaching out to cancel our Hiver Desk account effective immediately. We've been customers for about 8 months now, but we've experienced too many frustrating issues over the past two months. The mobile app crashes constantly, email sync has been unreliable, and our team has missed several customer inquiries because tickets just didn't come through. We've submitted support tickets about these problems but haven't seen any real improvement.

We're moving to a competitor next week and need to export all our historical tickets and customer data before we lose access. Can you please process the cancellation and let me know how to get our data out?

Thanks,
Marcus Chen
Operations Manager, BrightPath Solutions
reply:
Hi Marcus,

Thank you for reaching out, and I'm truly sorry to hear about the issues you've experienced with Hiver Desk. Missing customer inquiries and dealing with sync problems is incredibly frustrating, and I completely understand why you've made the decision to move on.

I've processed your cancellation request, and your account will remain active until the end of your current billing cycle on April 30th. You won't be charged again. To export all your historical data, go to Settings > Data Export > Full Account Backup, and you'll receive a downloadable ZIP file with all tickets, contacts, and attachments within 2-4 hours.

I want to acknowledge that we clearly fell short of your expectations, especially with the mobile app stability and email sync reliability. If you're open to it, I'd like to pass your specific feedback to our product team—your experience with missed tickets is something they need to hear directly.

Please let me know if you run into any issues with the data export, and I'll personally make sure you get everything you need for a smooth transition.

Best regards,
Sarah Mitchell
Customer Success Team, Hiver Desk

subject: Urgent: Duplicate charge on invoice #HD-8842 - need immediate refund
body:
Hi Hiver Desk support,

I just noticed we were charged twice for our Standard plan subscription this month. Our invoice #HD-8842 shows two separate charges of $149 each on March 1st, when we should only have been billed once. This has caused an overdraft in our company account and I need this resolved immediately.

I've attached a screenshot of both transactions from our bank statement. Can you please issue a refund for the duplicate charge as soon as possible? Our accounting team is waiting on this to close out the month.

Thanks,
Marcus Chen
Operations Manager
Brightwave Solutions
reply:
Hi Marcus,

I sincerely apologize for the duplicate charge on your account. I've reviewed invoice #HD-8842 and can confirm that you were indeed charged twice in error due to a payment processing glitch on our end on March 1st.

I've already initiated a full refund of $149 for the duplicate transaction. You should see this credit back in your account within 3-5 business days, though it often processes faster. I'm also applying a $25 account credit to your Hiver Desk account as an apology for the inconvenience and any overdraft fees this may have caused.

You'll receive a refund confirmation email within the next hour with the transaction reference number that you can share with your accounting team. If you don't see the funds returned within 5 business days, please reply to this email and I'll escalate immediately with our payment processor.

Again, I'm very sorry for the trouble this caused.

Best regards,
Sarah Mitchell
Hiver Desk Support Team

subject: Account cancellation request
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to reach out regarding our Hiver Desk subscription. We've been using the platform for about 8 months now, but we've recently decided to consolidate our tools and move to an all-in-one solution that includes helpdesk functionality. We'd like to cancel our account at the end of this billing cycle if possible.

Can you let me know what the process looks like and if there's anything we need to do on our end to export our ticket history before the account closes?

Thanks,
Marcus Webb
IT Manager, Cascade Solutions
reply:
Hi Marcus,

Thank you for reaching out, and I completely understand the need to consolidate your tech stack.

I've gone ahead and scheduled your account for cancellation at the end of your current billing cycle on April 15th. You won't be charged again after that date, and your team will have full access to Hiver Desk until then.

Regarding your data export, you can download your complete ticket history anytime before April 15th by going to Settings > Data Export > Generate Full Archive. The export typically takes 10-15 minutes depending on ticket volume, and you'll receive a download link via email. I'd recommend doing this within the next week to give yourself plenty of time.

If you run into any issues with the export or have questions before your account closes, just reply here and I'll be happy to help.

Best of luck with your new setup,
Sarah Chen
Customer Success Team

subject: Request: Bulk tagging functionality for tickets
body:
Hi Hiver Desk support,

I'm reaching out to see if there's a way to apply tags to multiple tickets at once. Our team processes a high volume of tickets each week, and we often need to categorize groups of them with the same tags after our weekly review meetings. Right now, we have to open each ticket individually and add tags one by one, which is pretty time-consuming.

Is there a bulk tagging feature I'm missing, or is this something that might be added in the future? It would really help streamline our workflow.

Thanks,
Marcus Chen
Operations Manager, DataFlow Solutions
reply:
Hi Marcus,

Thanks for writing in with this suggestion! I completely understand how bulk tagging would save your team significant time during those weekly reviews.

Currently, Hiver Desk doesn't have a native bulk tagging feature, but I really appreciate you bringing this up. I've added your request to our feature roadmap tracker (ticket #FR-2847) and included the specific use case you described. Our product team reviews these requests during monthly planning sessions, and requests from active users like yourself carry real weight in prioritization decisions.

In the meantime, one workaround some teams use is creating saved filters for common ticket groups and then using our API to apply tags programmatically. I can connect you with our solutions engineer if you'd like to explore that option.

I'll make sure to update you directly if bulk tagging makes it onto our development schedule.

Best regards,
Sarah Kim
Hiver Desk Support Team

subject: Urgent: Need enterprise pricing for 500+ seat deployment by Friday
body:
Hi Hiver Desk team,

I'm the VP of Customer Success at DataFlow Solutions, and we're currently evaluating helpdesk platforms to replace our existing solution. We need to make a decision by end of this week as our current contract expires on the 15th.

We're looking at deploying Hiver Desk across our entire customer support organization - approximately 500-600 seats across three regions (North America, EMEA, and APAC). We'll need SSO integration, custom SLA management, advanced reporting, and API access for our internal tools.

Can someone from your enterprise sales team contact me ASAP? We're speaking with two other vendors tomorrow and Thursday, so time is really of the essence here. I need detailed pricing, implementation timeline estimates, and information about your enterprise support SLAs.

My direct line is 555-0147 and I'm available for a call today or tomorrow morning.

Thanks,
Marcus Chen
VP Customer Success, DataFlow Solutions
reply:
Hi Marcus,

Thank you for considering Hiver Desk for your customer support operations at DataFlow Solutions. I completely understand the urgency given your timeline, and I want to make sure we can give your evaluation the attention it deserves.

I've immediately escalated your inquiry to our Enterprise Sales Director, Sarah Patel, who specializes in large-scale deployments like yours. Sarah will be reaching out to you directly within the next 2 hours at 555-0147 to schedule a call. She'll come prepared with pricing models for 500-600 seats, implementation timelines for multi-region deployments, and detailed information about our Enterprise tier which includes everything you've mentioned - SSO, custom SLAs, advanced analytics, and full API access.

Given your Friday decision deadline, Sarah will also bring along one of our Solutions Engineers to the call so we can address technical integration questions in real-time and accelerate the process.

If you don't hear from Sarah by 3 PM today, please reply to this email or call our enterprise hotline at 1-800-HIVER-ENT and reference ticket #HV-8847.

Looking forward to hopefully partnering with DataFlow Solutions.

Best regards,
Jamie Rodriguez
Enterprise Support Team, Hiver Desk

subject: Urgent: Email assignments not working for our team
body:
Hi Hiver Desk support,

We've been experiencing a critical issue since yesterday afternoon where email assignments are completely broken. When any of our team members try to assign a conversation to someone else, the assignment appears to go through but then reverts back to unassigned within seconds. This is causing massive confusion on our end because multiple agents are responding to the same tickets, and some urgent customer emails are falling through the cracks entirely.

We're a Pro plan customer and rely heavily on this feature to manage our support queue. This is really impacting our ability to serve our own customers. Can someone please look into this ASAP?

Marcus Chen
Head of Customer Success
Velocity Systems
reply:
Hi Marcus,

Thank you for reporting this and I'm sorry you're dealing with assignment issues at such a critical time. I can absolutely understand how disruptive this is for your team's workflow.

I've escalated this to our engineering team as a P1 issue and they've identified that this is affecting a small subset of Pro accounts that were migrated to our new assignment infrastructure last week. The good news is they've already developed a fix and are currently testing it.

Here's what happens next: Our engineering team will apply the fix to your account within the next 2 hours (by 3:00 PM EST today). I'll monitor your account personally and send you confirmation once it's deployed and verified. In the meantime, as a workaround, you can use @mentions in internal notes to route conversations to specific team members—those are working normally.

I'll follow up with you by 3:00 PM EST with confirmation that this is resolved. Please don't hesitate to reply if you see any continued issues after that.

Again, I apologize for the disruption to your team.

Best regards,
Priya Sharma
Senior Support Engineer
Hiver Desk

subject: URGENT: Email tickets not syncing to dashboard since this morning
body:
Hi Hiver Desk support,

We've been having a critical issue since around 8:30 AM EST today. Emails coming into our support@company.com inbox are not showing up in the Hiver Desk dashboard at all. Our team relies on this for triaging all customer requests and we're now missing incoming tickets.

I've checked our email forwarding settings and everything looks correct on our end. The inbox is receiving emails normally when I check it directly in Gmail, but nothing is appearing in Hiver Desk for the past 3 hours.

This is causing major delays in our customer response times. Can you please look into this immediately?

Thanks,
Marcus Chen
Customer Success Manager
Velocity Software
reply:
Hi Marcus,

Thank you for reporting this and I'm sorry you're experiencing sync issues with your support inbox. I can absolutely understand how disruptive this is to your team's workflow.

I've escalated this to our engineering team as a priority incident. Initial investigation shows there was a temporary disruption to our Gmail sync service between 8:15-8:45 AM EST that may have affected your account's connection. Our engineers are working on a full resync of your inbox right now to recover any missed tickets from that window.

You should start seeing new emails sync normally within the next 15-20 minutes. We'll also backfill any emails from this morning's gap, and I'll send you a confirmation email once the complete resync is finished (estimated within 45 minutes).

I'll be monitoring your account personally until this is fully resolved. Please reply to this email immediately if you don't see sync resume in the next 20 minutes.

Again, our apologies for the disruption.

Best regards,
Jordan Williams
Support Engineer, Hiver Desk

subject: When will you add time tracking to tickets?
body:
Hi there,

I've been using Hiver Desk for about 6 months now and overall it's been decent, but I'm really frustrated that there's still no native time tracking feature. Every other helpdesk platform I've evaluated has this built in. We need to track billable hours for our consulting clients and right now we're forced to use a separate timer app and manually enter everything into spreadsheets at the end of each week. It's a huge waste of time and prone to errors.

I saw someone request this feature in your community forum over a year ago and the thread has 47 upvotes, but there's been no update from your team. Can you please tell me if this is even on your roadmap? If not, I need to start evaluating alternatives because this manual process is not sustainable as we scale.

Thanks,
Marcus Chen
Operations Manager, Apex Solutions
reply:
Hi Marcus,

Thank you for taking the time to share this feedback, and I completely understand your frustration. Time tracking is absolutely on our roadmap, and I apologize that we haven't communicated updates more clearly on that community thread.

Our product team is currently in the planning phase for native time tracking functionality, with development scheduled to begin in Q2. While I can't commit to an exact launch date yet, the feature is prioritized for release in the second half of this year. I've added your account details and specific use case (billable hours for consulting) to the feature request ticket so our team understands the real-world impact this has on your workflow.

In the meantime, I'd like to schedule a 15-minute call with you next week if you're available. Our implementation specialist can show you a Zapier integration we've built with Toggl that several customers use as a bridge solution—it's not perfect, but it does eliminate most of the manual spreadsheet work. Would Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon work for you?

I'll also make sure you receive a direct update from our product manager when we have firm timelines to share.

Best regards,
Sarah Mitchell
Customer Success Team, Hiver Desk

subject: Urgent: Need enterprise quote for 200+ agent deployment by Friday
body:
Hi Hiver Desk team,

I'm the VP of Customer Operations at Ridgeline Technologies and we're currently evaluating helpdesk solutions for immediate deployment. Our existing contract with our current provider ends in 3 weeks and we need to make a decision by end of this week.

We're looking to onboard approximately 200-250 support agents across our North America and APAC teams, with requirements for SSO integration, advanced analytics, SLA management, and dedicated account support. Budget has already been approved on our end, but I need a detailed enterprise quote and implementation timeline ASAP.

Can someone from your enterprise sales team contact me today or tomorrow morning at the latest? This is time-sensitive as we're presenting options to our executive team on Friday.

Best regards,
Marcus Chen
VP Customer Operations, Ridgeline Technologies
marcus.chen@ridgelinetech.com | (415) 555-0147
reply:
Hi Marcus,

Thank you for reaching out to Hiver Desk, and I completely understand the urgency given your timeline. A deployment of 200+ agents with your integration requirements is exactly what our Enterprise plan is designed for.

I've immediately flagged this with our Enterprise Sales Director, Jennifer Walsh, who will be calling you directly within the next 2 hours at (415) 555-0147. She'll have a custom quote prepared based on your agent count and requirements, plus a detailed implementation roadmap that typically runs 2-3 weeks for organizations of your size.

In the meantime, I'm sending you a separate email with our Enterprise feature sheet, case studies from similar-sized deployments, and our standard SLA guarantees so you have materials ready for Friday's presentation.

Jennifer will also be able to arrange a technical demo with our solutions architect tomorrow if that would be helpful for your evaluation.

Looking forward to speaking with you shortly.

Best,
David Park
Enterprise Sales Team, Hiver Desk

subject: Urgent: Double billing issue for March - Need immediate refund
body:
Hi Hiver Desk team,

I'm reaching out because we've been charged twice for our Enterprise plan this month. Our accounting team flagged that we were billed $2,499 on March 1st and then again on March 3rd for the same billing period. This is completely unacceptable for an enterprise customer.

We've been with Hiver Desk for over two years and have never had billing issues like this before. I need this resolved immediately as our finance department is closing the books for Q1 and this duplicate charge is causing reconciliation problems on our end.

Please process a refund for the duplicate charge as soon as possible and confirm what happened so this doesn't occur again.

Marcus Chen
IT Director, Cornerstone Analytics
reply:
Hi Marcus,

I sincerely apologize for the double billing you experienced this month. I've reviewed your account and can confirm that you were indeed incorrectly charged twice on March 1st and March 3rd for $2,499 each.

I've already processed a full refund of $2,499 for the duplicate charge, which should appear in your original payment method within 5-7 business days. You'll receive a confirmation email with the refund receipt within the next hour.

After investigating, the issue was caused by a payment gateway timeout during your original transaction that led our system to retry the charge. We've now flagged your account to prevent any automatic retry attempts, and our engineering team has been notified to implement additional safeguards against this scenario.

Given the inconvenience and your tenure as a valued enterprise customer, I'd like to apply a 15% credit ($374.85) toward your April invoice as well. This will be reflected automatically on your next bill.

Please don't hesitate to reach out if you need any documentation for your Q1 close or if the refund doesn't appear within the stated timeframe.

Best regards,
Sarah Mitchell
Enterprise Support Team, Hiver Desk

subject: Re: Attachment preview not loading in Safari
body:
Hi Hiver Desk support,

I wanted to report a small issue I've been experiencing since yesterday. When I try to preview PDF attachments in Safari on my Mac, the preview pane just shows a loading spinner and never actually displays the document. The attachments download fine when I click the download button, so it's not a huge blocker for us, but the preview feature is really handy for quickly checking files. I tried clearing my cache and the issue persists. I'm on Safari 17.2 and macOS Sonoma. Everything works perfectly in Chrome, so I'm guessing it might be a Safari-specific thing. Thanks for looking into this!
reply:
Hi Marcus,

Thank you so much for reporting this and for including those helpful details about your browser and OS version! You're absolutely right—we've identified a Safari-specific issue with PDF previews that started after our release on Tuesday. Our engineering team is actively working on a fix and we expect to deploy it by end of day Thursday.

In the meantime, your workaround of using the download button or switching to Chrome will work perfectly. I've added your account to the notification list, so you'll receive an email as soon as the fix is live. We really appreciate your patience and understanding on this!

Best regards,
Sarah
Hiver Desk Support

subject: URGENT: Double charged for April subscription - need immediate refund
body:
Hi Hiver Desk Support,

I just checked our company credit card statement and noticed we were charged twice for our April subscription - once on April 1st for $299 and again on April 3rd for another $299. This is a significant issue for us as we're a small team and our finance department is flagging this as a discrepancy that needs immediate resolution.

I've attached screenshots of both charges from our bank statement. Our account email is operations@stellardesigns.com and our account ID is HD-47829. Can you please process a refund for the duplicate charge as soon as possible? We need this resolved before end of week for our monthly reconciliation.

Thanks,
Marcus Chen
Operations Manager, Stellar Designs
reply:
Hi Marcus,

Thank you for bringing this to our attention, and I sincerely apologize for the duplicate charge. I've reviewed your account (HD-47829) and can confirm that you were indeed charged twice in error due to a payment gateway sync issue that affected a small number of accounts on April 3rd.

I've immediately processed a full refund of $299 for the duplicate charge. You should see this credit back on your company card within 3-5 business days, though it often appears sooner. I've also applied a $50 credit to your Hiver Desk account as an apology for the inconvenience and any time this took from your day.

You'll receive a refund confirmation email within the next hour with the transaction reference number that you can share with your finance team. If the refund doesn't appear within 5 business days, please reply directly to this email and I'll escalate immediately with our payment processor.

Again, my apologies for the error, Marcus. Please let me know if you need anything else.

Best regards,
Sarah Mitchell
Hiver Desk Support Team
